global.footer_tagline: Making upcycling a lifestyle for all. Ethically sourced. Handsewn with love.

index.hero_slide1_title: Book an upcycling workshop for your team or school today and make sustainability a hands-on experience
index.hero_slide2_title: Transform your organization's fabric waste into value. Contact us today for customized upcycling consultation and execution!
index.hero_slide3_title: Empowering local beneficiaries by creating opportunities through upskilling and inclusive production efforts
index.story_body: Commenhers was founded with the goal of making slow fashion more accessible, without compromising on style. All of our products are 100% ethically sourced from textile recycling companies and donation drives, and handsewn with love by local housewives and tailors in small batches. Join our revolution to make upcycling a lifestyle for all.

about.hero_subtitle: The story behind Commenhers and the people who make it happen.
about.story_body: Commenhers was founded with the goal of making slow fashion more accessible, without compromising on style. All of our products are 100% ethically sourced from textile recycling companies and donation drives, and handsewn with love by local housewives and tailors in small batches. social_impact.hero_subtitle: Tracking the difference we make together — for people and the planet.
social_impact.testimonial_body: The DFS x Artist Fashion Show at Science Centre Singapore gave our Yuhua SewMates the chance to step out of their comfort zones and explore new possibilities. Guided by Commenhers, they turned materials like curtains and chip bags into beautiful upcycled fashion pieces. This experience helped them learn, grow, and make a meaningful impact by transforming waste into art, while building confidence and stronger connections within the community.
